use_cases: Immersive product feature reveals triggered by user scroll
Story-driven landing pages with expanding media sections
Portfolio or project showcases with scroll-triggered expansion
Video or image galleries with parallax-like expansion effects
Engaging hero sections for media and entertainment websites
ai_summary: An interactive hero component featuring scroll-driven media expansion that smoothly animates video or image content from collapsed to full-screen state using Framer Motion. Supports touch and wheel scroll interactions, text blending effects, and reveals additional content after expansion completes. Designed for immersive storytelling experiences in landing pages, portfolios, and product showcases.
